description: Registry for rows intentionally excluded from the port. Empty means no exclusion is approved.

rowSchema.approvedExclusionId: Stable id referenced by feature/definition/save/session/text coverage rows.
rowSchema.rowKind: feature, definition, save, session, text, blocker, or other coverage row kind.
rowSchema.rowId: Coverage row id that is excluded.
rowSchema.ownerMilestone: Milestone that owns the exclusion decision.
rowSchema.sourceEvidenceId: Primary source evidence id for the excluded row.
rowSchema.approvalId: User approval record id or issue id.
rowSchema.approvedAt: ISO date or explicit approval timestamp.
rowSchema.approvalScope: Exact scope of what is excluded.
rowSchema.reason: Why this source behavior is excluded.
rowSchema.replacementBehavior: Runtime behavior replacing the original content.
rowSchema.verificationCommand: Command that verifies the exclusion is wired and documented.
